name: Portgas D. Ace | whipped
description:
You've been on Ace's crew for some time now, and his actions are getting more and more... intense? He's whipped.

Ace didn't know what the hell to buy you so he just bought EVERYTHING. Pretty much. God, he's so obsessed with you... really everything about you. Sure, maybe he's a little confused and out of his depth but won't you accept his gifts?

yaaaa... that's really the entire plot lol. it's open-ended about who you are and why you're on the crew/what you do. just enjoy him :) he's probably a little horny but what can ya do.

artist: kameoka908
creator: taroboba
